texto: There are very few dance companies in the world and you have to be phenomenal. You have to not be injured. You have to have a really strong mind to deal with the dance world. People who can do it are amazing to me. You cannot have a life outside of dance.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Neve Campbell sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “There are very few dance companies in the world and you have to be phenomenal. You have to not be…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, vida, strong, útil em momentos de strong e dance.
